result.name: Log4Shell Remote Code Execution via JNDI
result.description: Log4j JNDI lookup enables unauthenticated remote code execution via crafted log message.

nvt.name: Log4Shell Remote Code Execution via JNDI
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:C/A:C|summary=remote code execution, command execution, rce, initial access pathway, exploit available|solution=Upgrade Log4j to 2.17.1 or later and remove JndiLookup class from classpath.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Upgrade Log4j to 2.17.1 or later and remove JndiLookup class from classpath.

result.name: Spring4Shell Remote Code Execution
result.description: Spring Framework ClassLoader manipulation permits unauthenticated remote code execution.

nvt.name: Spring4Shell Remote Code Execution
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:C/A:C|summary=remote code execution, command execution, rce, initial access, exploit|solution=Upgrade Spring Framework to 5.3.18+ and Spring Boot to 2.6.6+.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Upgrade Spring Framework to 5.3.18+ and Spring Boot to 2.6.6+.

result.name: Remote Code Execution via Unsafe Deserialization
result.description: Unsafe deserialization permits unauthenticated remote code execution and initial access foothold.

nvt.name: Remote Code Execution via Unsafe Deserialization
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:C/A:C|summary=remote code execution, command execution, exploit available, initial access pathway|solution=Disable unsafe deserialization paths and patch affected middleware immediately.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Disable unsafe deserialization paths and patch affected middleware immediately.

result.name: EternalBlue SMB Remote Code Execution MS17-010
result.description: Unpatched SMBv1 vulnerability MS17-010 allows remote code execution without authentication.

nvt.name: EternalBlue SMB Remote Code Execution MS17-010
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:C/A:C|summary=rce, remote code execution, smb, lateral movement, exploit available, initial access|solution=Apply MS17-010 patch, disable SMBv1 and restrict port 445 at the perimeter.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Apply MS17-010 patch, disable SMBv1 and restrict port 445 at the perimeter.

result.name: SQL Injection in Authentication Workflow
result.description: Insufficient input sanitization allows SQL injection using UNION SELECT against authentication endpoints.

nvt.name: SQL Injection in Authentication Workflow
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:C/A:C|summary=sql injection, union select, information disclosure, sensitive data leak from database query execution|solution=Apply parameterized queries and deploy WAF signatures for SQL injection patterns.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Apply parameterized queries and deploy WAF signatures for SQL injection patterns.

result.name: Apache HTTP Server Path Traversal
result.description: Path traversal in Apache HTTP Server may allow unauthorized file read and remote compromise of web content.

nvt.name: Apache HTTP Server Path Traversal
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:P/I:P/A:P|summary=path traversal, local file inclusion, file read, /etc/passwd exposure risk on internet-facing service|solution=Upgrade Apache HTTP Server to a patched release and harden request normalization controls.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Upgrade Apache HTTP Server to a patched release and harden request normalization controls.

result.name: Privilege Escalation Through Sudo Misconfiguration
result.description: Sudo policy permits privilege escalation to root via command injection on maintenance scripts.

nvt.name: Privilege Escalation Through Sudo Misconfiguration
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:L/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:C/A:C|summary=privilege escalation, sudo, setuid, command injection and persistence startup path|solution=Correct sudoers configuration and remove unsafe privileged command delegates.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Correct sudoers configuration and remove unsafe privileged command delegates.

result.name: Authentication Bypass with Default Credentials
result.description: Administrative portal accepts default credential combinations enabling authentication bypass and initial access.

nvt.name: Authentication Bypass with Default Credentials
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:P/I:P/A:P|summary=authentication bypass, bypass login, default credential, credential access and initial access risk|solution=Rotate all default credentials and enforce MFA and account lockout controls.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Rotate all default credentials and enforce MFA and account lockout controls.

result.name: Kerberos Ticket Exposure in Logs
result.description: Verbose logging leaks Kerberos ticket material and credential artifacts usable for lateral movement.

nvt.name: Kerberos Ticket Exposure in Logs
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:M/Au:N/C:P/I:N/A:N|summary=credential, password hash, token leakage, smb and rpc movement opportunities|solution=Restrict log verbosity and scrub credential artifacts from authentication logs.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Restrict log verbosity and scrub credential artifacts from authentication logs.

result.name: XML External Entity Injection in API Parser
result.description: XXE injection in XML API parser allows server-side request forgery and sensitive file read.

nvt.name: XML External Entity Injection in API Parser
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:P/I:P/A:N|summary=information disclosure, sensitive data, lfi, local file inclusion, ssrf via xxe injection|solution=Disable external entity resolution in XML parsers and validate all incoming XML input.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Disable external entity resolution in XML parsers and validate all incoming XML input.

result.name: Sensitive API Keys Stored in World-Readable Files
result.description: Application configuration stores API keys and private key material in world-readable filesystem paths.

nvt.name: Sensitive API Keys Stored in World-Readable Files

nvt.solution: Move secrets to a vault solution and restrict file permissions to owner-only read.

result.name: SMB Signing Disabled on File Service

result.name: TLS Deprecated Cipher Suites Enabled
result.description: Server advertises deprecated cipher suites enabling downgrade and weak key negotiation.

nvt.solution: Remove RC4, DES, and 3DES cipher suites and enforce TLS 1.2+ with strong cipher lists.

result.name: Directory Listing Enabled on Web Root

result.name: Redis Server Unauthenticated Access

result.name: Telnet Service Running in Cleartext

result.name: OpenSSL Heartbleed Memory Disclosure

result.name: Unrestricted File Upload Leading to RCE

result.name: Insecure Direct Object Reference in REST API

result.name: Weak JWT Signing Algorithm in Auth Token

result.name: SMB Signing Disabled on File Service
result.description: SMB signing is disabled allowing relay and man-in-the-middle credential capture.

nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:M/Au:N/C:P/I:P/A:N|summary=smb signing, credential relay, lateral movement, rpc relay potential|solution=Enable SMB signing via Group Policy on all hosts and restrict NTLM relay paths.|solution_type=VendorFix

result.name: TLS Deprecated Cipher Suites Enabled
result.description: Server advertises deprecated cipher suites enabling downgrade and weak key negotiation.

nvt.name: TLS Deprecated Cipher Suites Enabled
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:H/Au:N/C:P/I:N/A:N|summary=tls downgrade, weak cipher, information disclosure risk on encrypted transport channel|solution=Remove RC4, DES, and 3DES cipher suites and enforce TLS 1.2+ with strong cipher lists.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Remove RC4, DES, and 3DES cipher suites and enforce TLS 1.2+ with strong cipher lists.

result.name: Directory Listing Enabled on Web Root
result.description: Web server directory listing reveals internal file structure and sensitive file paths.

nvt.name: Directory Listing Enabled on Web Root

nvt.solution: Disable directory listing in web server configuration and enforce access controls.

result.name: Redis Server Unauthenticated Access

result.name: FTP Anonymous Login Enabled

result.name: SNMP Default Community String Accepted
result.description: SNMP accepts default community strings public and private exposing full MIB tree.

nvt.solution: Change SNMP community strings, migrate to SNMPv3 with auth and privacy options.

result.name: OpenSSL Heartbleed Memory Disclosure
result.description: Heartbleed allows remote read of heap memory including private keys and session credentials.

nvt.name: OpenSSL Heartbleed Memory Disclosure
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:N/A:N|summary=information disclosure, sensitive data, private key, credential, token leakage via openssl|solution=Upgrade OpenSSL to 1.0.1g or later and revoke and reissue all certificates.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Upgrade OpenSSL to 1.0.1g or later and revoke and reissue all certificates.

result.name: Unrestricted File Upload Leading to RCE
result.description: Upload endpoint accepts arbitrary file types enabling web shell upload and remote code execution.

nvt.name: Unrestricted File Upload Leading to RCE
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:C/A:C|summary=remote code execution, command execution, rce, initial access, exploit via file upload|solution=Validate MIME type and extension server-side and store uploads outside webroot.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Validate MIME type and extension server-side and store uploads outside webroot.

result.name: Insecure Direct Object Reference in REST API
result.description: API endpoints expose internal object identifiers allowing cross-account data access.

nvt.name: Insecure Direct Object Reference in REST API
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:S/C:C/I:N/A:N|summary=information disclosure, sensitive data, credential, token exposure via insecure reference|solution=Enforce object-level authorization checks and mask internal identifiers in API responses.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Enforce object-level authorization checks and mask internal identifiers in API responses.

result.name: Weak JWT Signing Algorithm in Auth Token
result.description: Application accepts JWTs signed with the none algorithm enabling authentication bypass.

nvt.name: Weak JWT Signing Algorithm in Auth Token
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:C/A:N|summary=authentication bypass, bypass login, token, credential access, initial access via jwt weakness|solution=Require strong HMAC or RSA signature algorithms and reject unsigned or weakly signed tokens.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Require strong HMAC or RSA signature algorithms and reject unsigned or weakly signed tokens.

result.name: SSH Weak Key Exchange Algorithms Permitted
result.description: SSH server negotiates deprecated Diffie-Hellman groups enabling passive key recovery.

nvt.name: SSH Weak Key Exchange Algorithms Permitted

nvt.solution: Remove diffie-hellman-group1-sha1 and diffie-hellman-group14-sha1 from sshd_config.

result.name: Cross-Site Request Forgery on Admin Panel

nvt.solution: Implement synchronizer token pattern and SameSite cookie attribute on all state-changing endpoints.

result.name: Reflected XSS in Error Page Parameter

result.name: Kerberos Ticket Exposure in Logs
result.description: Verbose logging leaks Kerberos ticket material and credential artifacts usable for lateral movement.

result.name: XML External Entity Injection in API Parser

nvt.solution: Disable external entity resolution in XML parsers and validate all incoming XML input.

result.name: Sensitive API Keys Stored in World-Readable Files
result.description: Application configuration stores API keys and private key material in world-readable filesystem paths.

result.name: Insecure Direct Object Reference in REST API

result.name: Weak JWT Signing Algorithm in Auth Token

nvt.name: SSH Weak Key Exchange Algorithms Permitted
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:H/Au:N/C:P/I:P/A:N|summary=credential, private key, information disclosure, weak kex downgrade on ssh service|solution=Remove diffie-hellman-group1-sha1 and diffie-hellman-group14-sha1 from sshd_config.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Remove diffie-hellman-group1-sha1 and diffie-hellman-group14-sha1 from sshd_config.

result.name: Cross-Site Request Forgery on Admin Panel
result.description: Admin panel lacks CSRF tokens enabling attacker-crafted requests to modify configuration.

nvt.name: Cross-Site Request Forgery on Admin Panel
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:M/Au:N/C:N/I:C/A:N|summary=authentication bypass, credential, initial access risk, bypass login via csrf attack|solution=Implement synchronizer token pattern and SameSite cookie attribute on all state-changing endpoints.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Implement synchronizer token pattern and SameSite cookie attribute on all state-changing endpoints.

result.name: Reflected XSS in Error Page Parameter
result.description: Error page reflects unsanitized URL parameters enabling script injection in victim sessions.

nvt.name: Reflected XSS in Error Page Parameter
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:P/I:P/A:N|summary=information disclosure, token, credential, sensitive data via xss script injection|solution=Sanitize all user-supplied input rendered in HTML and enforce a strict Content-Security-Policy.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Sanitize all user-supplied input rendered in HTML and enforce a strict Content-Security-Policy.

result.name: DNS Zone Transfer Allowed from Any Source
result.description: DNS server permits zone transfer to any requester exposing internal host inventory.

nvt.name: DNS Zone Transfer Allowed from Any Source
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:P/I:N/A:N|summary=information disclosure, sensitive data, credential, internal network topology leak via dns axfr|solution=Restrict AXFR queries to authorised secondary nameservers using allow-transfer ACLs.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Restrict AXFR queries to authorised secondary nameservers using allow-transfer ACLs.

result.name: HTTP Security Headers Missing on Web Application
result.description: Application responses omit X-Frame-Options, HSTS, and CSP headers enabling content injection.

nvt.name: HTTP Security Headers Missing on Web Application
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:M/Au:N/C:P/I:N/A:N|summary=information disclosure, sensitive data, token, credential leakage via missing security headers|solution=Configure X-Frame-Options DENY, Strict-Transport-Security, and Content-Security-Policy headers.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Configure X-Frame-Options DENY, Strict-Transport-Security, and Content-Security-Policy headers.

result.name: Outdated jQuery Version with Known XSS Vulnerabilities
result.description: Application loads jQuery version with prototype pollution and XSS vulnerabilities.

nvt.name: Outdated jQuery Version with Known XSS Vulnerabilities
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:M/Au:N/C:P/I:N/A:N|summary=information disclosure, token, sensitive data, credential exposure via client-side library|solution=Upgrade jQuery to the latest stable release and implement Subresource Integrity checks.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Upgrade jQuery to the latest stable release and implement Subresource Integrity checks.

result.name: NFS Share World-Readable Without Authentication
result.description: NFS export accessible from any host exposing filesystem contents without authentication.

nvt.name: NFS Share World-Readable Without Authentication
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:N/A:N|summary=information disclosure, sensitive data, api key, private key, credential via nfs read access|solution=Restrict NFS exports to specific IP ranges and enforce Kerberos authentication.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Restrict NFS exports to specific IP ranges and enforce Kerberos authentication.

result.name: Memcached UDP Amplification Attack Surface
result.description: Memcached UDP port exposed enabling amplification-based denial of service.

nvt.name: Memcached UDP Amplification Attack Surface
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:N/I:N/A:P|summary=information disclosure, sensitive data exposure via open memcached udp service|solution=Disable UDP on Memcached and bind to loopback interface or authenticated VPN only.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Disable UDP on Memcached and bind to loopback interface or authenticated VPN only.

result.name: Sensitive API Keys Stored in World-Readable Files
result.description: Application configuration stores API keys and private key material in world-readable filesystem paths.

nvt.name: Sensitive API Keys Stored in World-Readable Files
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:L/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:N/A:N|summary=api key, token, secret, private key, hardcoded credential and information disclosure risk|solution=Move secrets to a vault solution and restrict file permissions to owner-only read.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Move secrets to a vault solution and restrict file permissions to owner-only read.

result.name: SMB Signing Disabled on File Service
result.description: SMB signing is disabled allowing relay and man-in-the-middle credential capture.

nvt.name: SMB Signing Disabled on File Service
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:M/Au:N/C:P/I:P/A:N|summary=smb signing, credential relay, lateral movement, rpc relay potential|solution=Enable SMB signing via Group Policy on all hosts and restrict NTLM relay paths.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Enable SMB signing via Group Policy on all hosts and restrict NTLM relay paths.

result.name: TLS Deprecated Cipher Suites Enabled
result.description: Server advertises deprecated cipher suites enabling downgrade and weak key negotiation.

nvt.name: TLS Deprecated Cipher Suites Enabled
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:H/Au:N/C:P/I:N/A:N|summary=tls downgrade, weak cipher, information disclosure risk on encrypted transport channel|solution=Remove RC4, DES, and 3DES cipher suites and enforce TLS 1.2+ with strong cipher lists.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Remove RC4, DES, and 3DES cipher suites and enforce TLS 1.2+ with strong cipher lists.

result.name: Directory Listing Enabled on Web Root
result.description: Web server directory listing reveals internal file structure and sensitive file paths.

nvt.name: Directory Listing Enabled on Web Root
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:P/I:N/A:N|summary=information disclosure, directory listing, sensitive data exposure on public web root|solution=Disable directory listing in web server configuration and enforce access controls.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Disable directory listing in web server configuration and enforce access controls.

result.name: Redis Server Unauthenticated Access

nvt.name: Redis Server Unauthenticated Access
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:C/A:C|summary=remote code execution, initial access, credential, sensitive data, database command execution|solution=Require requirepass authentication and bind Redis to loopback or VPN interface only.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Require requirepass authentication and bind Redis to loopback or VPN interface only.

result.name: FTP Anonymous Login Enabled

result.name: Telnet Service Running in Cleartext

result.name: OpenSSL Heartbleed Memory Disclosure

nvt.solution: Upgrade OpenSSL to 1.0.1g or later and revoke and reissue all certificates.

nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:M/Au:N/C:P/I:N/A:N|summary=information disclosure, token, sensitive data, credential exposure via client-side library|solution=Upgrade jQuery to the latest stable release and implement Subresource Integrity checks.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Upgrade jQuery to the latest stable release and implement Subresource Integrity checks.

result.name: NFS Share World-Readable Without Authentication
result.description: NFS export accessible from any host exposing filesystem contents without authentication.

nvt.name: NFS Share World-Readable Without Authentication
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:N/A:N|summary=information disclosure, sensitive data, api key, private key, credential via nfs read access|solution=Restrict NFS exports to specific IP ranges and enforce Kerberos authentication.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Restrict NFS exports to specific IP ranges and enforce Kerberos authentication.

result.name: Memcached UDP Amplification Attack Surface
result.description: Memcached UDP port exposed enabling amplification-based denial of service.

nvt.name: Memcached UDP Amplification Attack Surface
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:N/I:N/A:P|summary=information disclosure, sensitive data exposure via open memcached udp service|solution=Disable UDP on Memcached and bind to loopback interface or authenticated VPN only.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Disable UDP on Memcached and bind to loopback interface or authenticated VPN only.

result.name: Sensitive API Keys Stored in World-Readable Files
result.description: Application configuration stores API keys and private key material in world-readable filesystem paths.

nvt.name: Sensitive API Keys Stored in World-Readable Files
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:L/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:N/A:N|summary=api key, token, secret, private key, hardcoded credential and information disclosure risk|solution=Move secrets to a vault solution and restrict file permissions to owner-only read.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Move secrets to a vault solution and restrict file permissions to owner-only read.

result.name: SMB Signing Disabled on File Service
result.description: SMB signing is disabled allowing relay and man-in-the-middle credential capture.

nvt.name: SMB Signing Disabled on File Service
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:M/Au:N/C:P/I:P/A:N|summary=smb signing, credential relay, lateral movement, rpc relay potential|solution=Enable SMB signing via Group Policy on all hosts and restrict NTLM relay paths.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Enable SMB signing via Group Policy on all hosts and restrict NTLM relay paths.

result.name: TLS Deprecated Cipher Suites Enabled
result.description: Server advertises deprecated cipher suites enabling downgrade and weak key negotiation.

nvt.name: TLS Deprecated Cipher Suites Enabled
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:H/Au:N/C:P/I:N/A:N|summary=tls downgrade, weak cipher, information disclosure risk on encrypted transport channel|solution=Remove RC4, DES, and 3DES cipher suites and enforce TLS 1.2+ with strong cipher lists.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Remove RC4, DES, and 3DES cipher suites and enforce TLS 1.2+ with strong cipher lists.

result.name: Directory Listing Enabled on Web Root
result.description: Web server directory listing reveals internal file structure and sensitive file paths.

nvt.name: Directory Listing Enabled on Web Root
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:P/I:N/A:N|summary=information disclosure, directory listing, sensitive data exposure on public web root|solution=Disable directory listing in web server configuration and enforce access controls.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Disable directory listing in web server configuration and enforce access controls.

result.name: Redis Server Unauthenticated Access
result.description: Redis service exposed without authentication allows arbitrary key read, write, and OS command execution.

nvt.name: Redis Server Unauthenticated Access
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:C/A:C|summary=remote code execution, initial access, credential, sensitive data, database command execution|solution=Require requirepass authentication and bind Redis to loopback or VPN interface only.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Require requirepass authentication and bind Redis to loopback or VPN interface only.

result.name: FTP Anonymous Login Enabled
result.description: FTP service permits anonymous login enabling unauthenticated file read and write.

nvt.solution: Disable anonymous FTP and enforce authenticated TLS-secured connections.

result.name: Telnet Service Running in Cleartext
result.description: Telnet transmits credentials and session data in cleartext enabling credential theft.

nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:C/A:C|summary=credential, password, initial access, information disclosure, cleartext auth bypass risk|solution=Disable Telnet and migrate to SSH with key-based authentication and strong ciphers.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Disable Telnet and migrate to SSH with key-based authentication and strong ciphers.

result.name: SNMP Default Community String Accepted
result.description: SNMP accepts default community strings public and private exposing full MIB tree.

nvt.name: SNMP Default Community String Accepted
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:P/I:P/A:N|summary=information disclosure, sensitive data, credential, default credential, initial access via snmp|solution=Change SNMP community strings, migrate to SNMPv3 with auth and privacy options.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Change SNMP community strings, migrate to SNMPv3 with auth and privacy options.

result.name: OpenSSL Heartbleed Memory Disclosure
result.description: Heartbleed allows remote read of heap memory including private keys and session credentials.

nvt.name: OpenSSL Heartbleed Memory Disclosure
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:N/A:N|summary=information disclosure, sensitive data, private key, credential, token leakage via openssl|solution=Upgrade OpenSSL to 1.0.1g or later and revoke and reissue all certificates.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Upgrade OpenSSL to 1.0.1g or later and revoke and reissue all certificates.

result.name: Unrestricted File Upload Leading to RCE
result.description: Upload endpoint accepts arbitrary file types enabling web shell upload and remote code execution.

nvt.name: Unrestricted File Upload Leading to RCE
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:C/A:C|summary=remote code execution, command execution, rce, initial access, exploit via file upload|solution=Validate MIME type and extension server-side and store uploads outside webroot.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Validate MIME type and extension server-side and store uploads outside webroot.

result.name: Insecure Direct Object Reference in REST API
result.description: API endpoints expose internal object identifiers allowing cross-account data access.

nvt.name: Insecure Direct Object Reference in REST API
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:S/C:C/I:N/A:N|summary=information disclosure, sensitive data, credential, token exposure via insecure reference|solution=Enforce object-level authorization checks and mask internal identifiers in API responses.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Enforce object-level authorization checks and mask internal identifiers in API responses.

result.name: Weak JWT Signing Algorithm in Auth Token
result.description: Application accepts JWTs signed with the none algorithm enabling authentication bypass.

nvt.name: Weak JWT Signing Algorithm in Auth Token
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:C/A:N|summary=authentication bypass, bypass login, token, credential access, initial access via jwt weakness|solution=Require strong HMAC or RSA signature algorithms and reject unsigned or weakly signed tokens.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Require strong HMAC or RSA signature algorithms and reject unsigned or weakly signed tokens.

result.name: SSH Weak Key Exchange Algorithms Permitted
result.description: SSH server negotiates deprecated Diffie-Hellman groups enabling passive key recovery.

nvt.solution: Remove diffie-hellman-group1-sha1 and diffie-hellman-group14-sha1 from sshd_config.

nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:P/I:P/A:P|summary=path traversal, local file inclusion, file read, /etc/passwd exposure risk on internet-facing service|solution=Upgrade Apache HTTP Server to a patched release and harden request normalization controls.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Upgrade Apache HTTP Server to a patched release and harden request normalization controls.

result.name: Privilege Escalation Through Sudo Misconfiguration
result.description: Sudo policy permits privilege escalation to root via command injection on maintenance scripts.

nvt.name: Privilege Escalation Through Sudo Misconfiguration
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:L/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:C/A:C|summary=privilege escalation, sudo, setuid, command injection and persistence startup path|solution=Correct sudoers configuration and remove unsafe privileged command delegates.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Correct sudoers configuration and remove unsafe privileged command delegates.

result.name: Authentication Bypass with Default Credentials
result.description: Administrative portal accepts default credential combinations enabling authentication bypass and initial access.

nvt.name: Authentication Bypass with Default Credentials
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:P/I:P/A:P|summary=authentication bypass, bypass login, default credential, credential access and initial access risk|solution=Rotate all default credentials and enforce MFA and account lockout controls.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Rotate all default credentials and enforce MFA and account lockout controls.

result.name: Kerberos Ticket Exposure in Logs
result.description: Verbose logging leaks Kerberos ticket material and credential artifacts usable for lateral movement.

nvt.name: Kerberos Ticket Exposure in Logs
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:M/Au:N/C:P/I:N/A:N|summary=credential, password hash, token leakage, smb and rpc movement opportunities|solution=Restrict log verbosity and scrub credential artifacts from authentication logs.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Restrict log verbosity and scrub credential artifacts from authentication logs.

result.name: XML External Entity Injection in API Parser
result.description: XXE injection in XML API parser allows server-side request forgery and sensitive file read.

nvt.name: XML External Entity Injection in API Parser
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:P/I:P/A:N|summary=information disclosure, sensitive data, lfi, local file inclusion, ssrf via xxe injection|solution=Disable external entity resolution in XML parsers and validate all incoming XML input.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Disable external entity resolution in XML parsers and validate all incoming XML input.

result.name: Sensitive API Keys Stored in World-Readable Files
result.description: Application configuration stores API keys and private key material in world-readable filesystem paths.

nvt.name: Sensitive API Keys Stored in World-Readable Files
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:L/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:N/A:N|summary=api key, token, secret, private key, hardcoded credential and information disclosure risk|solution=Move secrets to a vault solution and restrict file permissions to owner-only read.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Move secrets to a vault solution and restrict file permissions to owner-only read.

result.name: SMB Signing Disabled on File Service
result.description: SMB signing is disabled allowing relay and man-in-the-middle credential capture.

nvt.name: SMB Signing Disabled on File Service
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:M/Au:N/C:P/I:P/A:N|summary=smb signing, credential relay, lateral movement, rpc relay potential|solution=Enable SMB signing via Group Policy on all hosts and restrict NTLM relay paths.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Enable SMB signing via Group Policy on all hosts and restrict NTLM relay paths.

result.name: TLS Deprecated Cipher Suites Enabled
result.description: Server advertises deprecated cipher suites enabling downgrade and weak key negotiation.

nvt.name: TLS Deprecated Cipher Suites Enabled
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:H/Au:N/C:P/I:N/A:N|summary=tls downgrade, weak cipher, information disclosure risk on encrypted transport channel|solution=Remove RC4, DES, and 3DES cipher suites and enforce TLS 1.2+ with strong cipher lists.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Remove RC4, DES, and 3DES cipher suites and enforce TLS 1.2+ with strong cipher lists.

result.name: Directory Listing Enabled on Web Root
result.description: Web server directory listing reveals internal file structure and sensitive file paths.

nvt.name: Directory Listing Enabled on Web Root
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:P/I:N/A:N|summary=information disclosure, directory listing, sensitive data exposure on public web root|solution=Disable directory listing in web server configuration and enforce access controls.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Disable directory listing in web server configuration and enforce access controls.

result.name: Redis Server Unauthenticated Access
result.description: Redis service exposed without authentication allows arbitrary key read, write, and OS command execution.

nvt.name: Redis Server Unauthenticated Access
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:C/A:C|summary=remote code execution, initial access, credential, sensitive data, database command execution|solution=Require requirepass authentication and bind Redis to loopback or VPN interface only.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Require requirepass authentication and bind Redis to loopback or VPN interface only.

result.name: FTP Anonymous Login Enabled
result.description: FTP service permits anonymous login enabling unauthenticated file read and write.

nvt.name: FTP Anonymous Login Enabled
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:P/I:P/A:N|summary=information disclosure, sensitive data, initial access, file read via ftp anonymous credential|solution=Disable anonymous FTP and enforce authenticated TLS-secured connections.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Disable anonymous FTP and enforce authenticated TLS-secured connections.

result.name: Telnet Service Running in Cleartext
result.description: Telnet transmits credentials and session data in cleartext enabling credential theft.

nvt.name: Telnet Service Running in Cleartext
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:C/A:C|summary=credential, password, initial access, information disclosure, cleartext auth bypass risk|solution=Disable Telnet and migrate to SSH with key-based authentication and strong ciphers.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Disable Telnet and migrate to SSH with key-based authentication and strong ciphers.

result.name: SNMP Default Community String Accepted
result.description: SNMP accepts default community strings public and private exposing full MIB tree.

nvt.name: SNMP Default Community String Accepted
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:P/I:P/A:N|summary=information disclosure, sensitive data, credential, default credential, initial access via snmp|solution=Change SNMP community strings, migrate to SNMPv3 with auth and privacy options.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Change SNMP community strings, migrate to SNMPv3 with auth and privacy options.

result.name: OpenSSL Heartbleed Memory Disclosure
result.description: Heartbleed allows remote read of heap memory including private keys and session credentials.

nvt.name: OpenSSL Heartbleed Memory Disclosure
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:N/A:N|summary=information disclosure, sensitive data, private key, credential, token leakage via openssl|solution=Upgrade OpenSSL to 1.0.1g or later and revoke and reissue all certificates.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Upgrade OpenSSL to 1.0.1g or later and revoke and reissue all certificates.

result.name: Unrestricted File Upload Leading to RCE
result.description: Upload endpoint accepts arbitrary file types enabling web shell upload and remote code execution.

nvt.name: Unrestricted File Upload Leading to RCE
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:C/A:C|summary=remote code execution, command execution, rce, initial access, exploit via file upload|solution=Validate MIME type and extension server-side and store uploads outside webroot.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Validate MIME type and extension server-side and store uploads outside webroot.

result.name: Insecure Direct Object Reference in REST API
result.description: API endpoints expose internal object identifiers allowing cross-account data access.

nvt.name: Insecure Direct Object Reference in REST API
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:S/C:C/I:N/A:N|summary=information disclosure, sensitive data, credential, token exposure via insecure reference|solution=Enforce object-level authorization checks and mask internal identifiers in API responses.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Enforce object-level authorization checks and mask internal identifiers in API responses.

result.name: Weak JWT Signing Algorithm in Auth Token
result.description: Application accepts JWTs signed with the none algorithm enabling authentication bypass.

nvt.name: Weak JWT Signing Algorithm in Auth Token
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:C/A:N|summary=authentication bypass, bypass login, token, credential access, initial access via jwt weakness|solution=Require strong HMAC or RSA signature algorithms and reject unsigned or weakly signed tokens.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Require strong HMAC or RSA signature algorithms and reject unsigned or weakly signed tokens.

result.name: SSH Weak Key Exchange Algorithms Permitted
result.description: SSH server negotiates deprecated Diffie-Hellman groups enabling passive key recovery.

nvt.name: SSH Weak Key Exchange Algorithms Permitted
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:H/Au:N/C:P/I:P/A:N|summary=credential, private key, information disclosure, weak kex downgrade on ssh service|solution=Remove diffie-hellman-group1-sha1 and diffie-hellman-group14-sha1 from sshd_config.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Remove diffie-hellman-group1-sha1 and diffie-hellman-group14-sha1 from sshd_config.

result.name: Cross-Site Request Forgery on Admin Panel

nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:M/Au:N/C:N/I:C/A:N|summary=authentication bypass, credential, initial access risk, bypass login via csrf attack|solution=Implement synchronizer token pattern and SameSite cookie attribute on all state-changing endpoints.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Implement synchronizer token pattern and SameSite cookie attribute on all state-changing endpoints.

result.name: Reflected XSS in Error Page Parameter

nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:P/I:P/A:N|summary=information disclosure, token, credential, sensitive data via xss script injection|solution=Sanitize all user-supplied input rendered in HTML and enforce a strict Content-Security-Policy.|solution_type=VendorFix

result.name: Insecure Direct Object Reference in REST API

result.name: Insecure Direct Object Reference in REST API

result.name: Weak JWT Signing Algorithm in Auth Token

result.name: SSH Weak Key Exchange Algorithms Permitted

result.name: Insecure Direct Object Reference in REST API

result.name: Weak JWT Signing Algorithm in Auth Token

result.name: SSH Weak Key Exchange Algorithms Permitted

nvt.name: SNMP Default Community String Accepted
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:P/I:P/A:N|summary=information disclosure, sensitive data, credential, default credential, initial access via snmp|solution=Change SNMP community strings, migrate to SNMPv3 with auth and privacy options.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Change SNMP community strings, migrate to SNMPv3 with auth and privacy options.

result.name: OpenSSL Heartbleed Memory Disclosure
result.description: Heartbleed allows remote read of heap memory including private keys and session credentials.

nvt.name: OpenSSL Heartbleed Memory Disclosure
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:N/A:N|summary=information disclosure, sensitive data, private key, credential, token leakage via openssl|solution=Upgrade OpenSSL to 1.0.1g or later and revoke and reissue all certificates.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Upgrade OpenSSL to 1.0.1g or later and revoke and reissue all certificates.

result.name: Unrestricted File Upload Leading to RCE
result.description: Upload endpoint accepts arbitrary file types enabling web shell upload and remote code execution.

nvt.name: Unrestricted File Upload Leading to RCE
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:C/A:C|summary=remote code execution, command execution, rce, initial access, exploit via file upload|solution=Validate MIME type and extension server-side and store uploads outside webroot.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Validate MIME type and extension server-side and store uploads outside webroot.

result.name: Insecure Direct Object Reference in REST API
result.description: API endpoints expose internal object identifiers allowing cross-account data access.

nvt.name: Insecure Direct Object Reference in REST API
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:S/C:C/I:N/A:N|summary=information disclosure, sensitive data, credential, token exposure via insecure reference|solution=Enforce object-level authorization checks and mask internal identifiers in API responses.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Enforce object-level authorization checks and mask internal identifiers in API responses.

result.name: Weak JWT Signing Algorithm in Auth Token
result.description: Application accepts JWTs signed with the none algorithm enabling authentication bypass.

nvt.name: Weak JWT Signing Algorithm in Auth Token
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:C/A:N|summary=authentication bypass, bypass login, token, credential access, initial access via jwt weakness|solution=Require strong HMAC or RSA signature algorithms and reject unsigned or weakly signed tokens.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Require strong HMAC or RSA signature algorithms and reject unsigned or weakly signed tokens.

result.name: SSH Weak Key Exchange Algorithms Permitted
result.description: SSH server negotiates deprecated Diffie-Hellman groups enabling passive key recovery.

nvt.name: SSH Weak Key Exchange Algorithms Permitted
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:H/Au:N/C:P/I:P/A:N|summary=credential, private key, information disclosure, weak kex downgrade on ssh service|solution=Remove diffie-hellman-group1-sha1 and diffie-hellman-group14-sha1 from sshd_config.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Remove diffie-hellman-group1-sha1 and diffie-hellman-group14-sha1 from sshd_config.

result.name: Cross-Site Request Forgery on Admin Panel
result.description: Admin panel lacks CSRF tokens enabling attacker-crafted requests to modify configuration.

nvt.name: Cross-Site Request Forgery on Admin Panel
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:M/Au:N/C:N/I:C/A:N|summary=authentication bypass, credential, initial access risk, bypass login via csrf attack|solution=Implement synchronizer token pattern and SameSite cookie attribute on all state-changing endpoints.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Implement synchronizer token pattern and SameSite cookie attribute on all state-changing endpoints.

result.name: Reflected XSS in Error Page Parameter
result.description: Error page reflects unsanitized URL parameters enabling script injection in victim sessions.

nvt.name: Reflected XSS in Error Page Parameter
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:P/I:P/A:N|summary=information disclosure, token, credential, sensitive data via xss script injection|solution=Sanitize all user-supplied input rendered in HTML and enforce a strict Content-Security-Policy.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Sanitize all user-supplied input rendered in HTML and enforce a strict Content-Security-Policy.

result.name: DNS Zone Transfer Allowed from Any Source
result.description: DNS server permits zone transfer to any requester exposing internal host inventory.

nvt.name: DNS Zone Transfer Allowed from Any Source
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:P/I:N/A:N|summary=information disclosure, sensitive data, credential, internal network topology leak via dns axfr|solution=Restrict AXFR queries to authorised secondary nameservers using allow-transfer ACLs.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Restrict AXFR queries to authorised secondary nameservers using allow-transfer ACLs.

result.name: HTTP Security Headers Missing on Web Application
result.description: Application responses omit X-Frame-Options, HSTS, and CSP headers enabling content injection.

nvt.name: HTTP Security Headers Missing on Web Application
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:M/Au:N/C:P/I:N/A:N|summary=information disclosure, sensitive data, token, credential leakage via missing security headers|solution=Configure X-Frame-Options DENY, Strict-Transport-Security, and Content-Security-Policy headers.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Configure X-Frame-Options DENY, Strict-Transport-Security, and Content-Security-Policy headers.

result.name: Outdated jQuery Version with Known XSS Vulnerabilities
result.description: Application loads jQuery version with prototype pollution and XSS vulnerabilities.

nvt.name: Outdated jQuery Version with Known XSS Vulnerabilities
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:M/Au:N/C:P/I:N/A:N|summary=information disclosure, token, sensitive data, credential exposure via client-side library|solution=Upgrade jQuery to the latest stable release and implement Subresource Integrity checks.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Upgrade jQuery to the latest stable release and implement Subresource Integrity checks.

result.name: NFS Share World-Readable Without Authentication
result.description: NFS export accessible from any host exposing filesystem contents without authentication.

nvt.name: NFS Share World-Readable Without Authentication
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:N/A:N|summary=information disclosure, sensitive data, api key, private key, credential via nfs read access|solution=Restrict NFS exports to specific IP ranges and enforce Kerberos authentication.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Restrict NFS exports to specific IP ranges and enforce Kerberos authentication.

result.name: Memcached UDP Amplification Attack Surface
result.description: Memcached UDP port exposed enabling amplification-based denial of service.

nvt.name: Memcached UDP Amplification Attack Surface
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:N/I:N/A:P|summary=information disclosure, sensitive data exposure via open memcached udp service|solution=Disable UDP on Memcached and bind to loopback interface or authenticated VPN only.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Disable UDP on Memcached and bind to loopback interface or authenticated VPN only.

result.name: Sensitive API Keys Stored in World-Readable Files
result.description: Application configuration stores API keys and private key material in world-readable filesystem paths.

nvt.name: Sensitive API Keys Stored in World-Readable Files
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:L/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:N/A:N|summary=api key, token, secret, private key, hardcoded credential and information disclosure risk|solution=Move secrets to a vault solution and restrict file permissions to owner-only read.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Move secrets to a vault solution and restrict file permissions to owner-only read.

result.name: SMB Signing Disabled on File Service

result.name: TLS Deprecated Cipher Suites Enabled

nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:M/Au:N/C:P/I:N/A:N|summary=information disclosure, token, sensitive data, credential exposure via client-side library|solution=Upgrade jQuery to the latest stable release and implement Subresource Integrity checks.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Upgrade jQuery to the latest stable release and implement Subresource Integrity checks.

result.name: NFS Share World-Readable Without Authentication
result.description: NFS export accessible from any host exposing filesystem contents without authentication.

nvt.name: NFS Share World-Readable Without Authentication
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:N/A:N|summary=information disclosure, sensitive data, api key, private key, credential via nfs read access|solution=Restrict NFS exports to specific IP ranges and enforce Kerberos authentication.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Restrict NFS exports to specific IP ranges and enforce Kerberos authentication.

result.name: Memcached UDP Amplification Attack Surface
result.description: Memcached UDP port exposed enabling amplification-based denial of service.

nvt.name: Memcached UDP Amplification Attack Surface
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:N/I:N/A:P|summary=information disclosure, sensitive data exposure via open memcached udp service|solution=Disable UDP on Memcached and bind to loopback interface or authenticated VPN only.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Disable UDP on Memcached and bind to loopback interface or authenticated VPN only.

result.name: Sensitive API Keys Stored in World-Readable Files
result.description: Application configuration stores API keys and private key material in world-readable filesystem paths.

nvt.name: Sensitive API Keys Stored in World-Readable Files
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:L/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:N/A:N|summary=api key, token, secret, private key, hardcoded credential and information disclosure risk|solution=Move secrets to a vault solution and restrict file permissions to owner-only read.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Move secrets to a vault solution and restrict file permissions to owner-only read.

result.name: SMB Signing Disabled on File Service
result.description: SMB signing is disabled allowing relay and man-in-the-middle credential capture.

nvt.name: SMB Signing Disabled on File Service
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:M/Au:N/C:P/I:P/A:N|summary=smb signing, credential relay, lateral movement, rpc relay potential|solution=Enable SMB signing via Group Policy on all hosts and restrict NTLM relay paths.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Enable SMB signing via Group Policy on all hosts and restrict NTLM relay paths.

result.name: TLS Deprecated Cipher Suites Enabled
result.description: Server advertises deprecated cipher suites enabling downgrade and weak key negotiation.

nvt.name: TLS Deprecated Cipher Suites Enabled
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:H/Au:N/C:P/I:N/A:N|summary=tls downgrade, weak cipher, information disclosure risk on encrypted transport channel|solution=Remove RC4, DES, and 3DES cipher suites and enforce TLS 1.2+ with strong cipher lists.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Remove RC4, DES, and 3DES cipher suites and enforce TLS 1.2+ with strong cipher lists.

result.name: Directory Listing Enabled on Web Root
result.description: Web server directory listing reveals internal file structure and sensitive file paths.

nvt.name: Directory Listing Enabled on Web Root
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:P/I:N/A:N|summary=information disclosure, directory listing, sensitive data exposure on public web root|solution=Disable directory listing in web server configuration and enforce access controls.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Disable directory listing in web server configuration and enforce access controls.

result.name: Redis Server Unauthenticated Access
result.description: Redis service exposed without authentication allows arbitrary key read, write, and OS command execution.

nvt.name: Redis Server Unauthenticated Access
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:C/A:C|summary=remote code execution, initial access, credential, sensitive data, database command execution|solution=Require requirepass authentication and bind Redis to loopback or VPN interface only.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Require requirepass authentication and bind Redis to loopback or VPN interface only.

result.name: FTP Anonymous Login Enabled
result.description: FTP service permits anonymous login enabling unauthenticated file read and write.

nvt.solution: Disable anonymous FTP and enforce authenticated TLS-secured connections.

result.name: Telnet Service Running in Cleartext
result.description: Telnet transmits credentials and session data in cleartext enabling credential theft.

nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:C/A:C|summary=credential, password, initial access, information disclosure, cleartext auth bypass risk|solution=Disable Telnet and migrate to SSH with key-based authentication and strong ciphers.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Disable Telnet and migrate to SSH with key-based authentication and strong ciphers.

result.name: SNMP Default Community String Accepted
result.description: SNMP accepts default community strings public and private exposing full MIB tree.

nvt.name: SNMP Default Community String Accepted
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:P/I:P/A:N|summary=information disclosure, sensitive data, credential, default credential, initial access via snmp|solution=Change SNMP community strings, migrate to SNMPv3 with auth and privacy options.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Change SNMP community strings, migrate to SNMPv3 with auth and privacy options.

result.name: OpenSSL Heartbleed Memory Disclosure
result.description: Heartbleed allows remote read of heap memory including private keys and session credentials.

nvt.name: OpenSSL Heartbleed Memory Disclosure
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:N/A:N|summary=information disclosure, sensitive data, private key, credential, token leakage via openssl|solution=Upgrade OpenSSL to 1.0.1g or later and revoke and reissue all certificates.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Upgrade OpenSSL to 1.0.1g or later and revoke and reissue all certificates.

result.name: Unrestricted File Upload Leading to RCE
result.description: Upload endpoint accepts arbitrary file types enabling web shell upload and remote code execution.

nvt.name: Unrestricted File Upload Leading to RCE
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:C/A:C|summary=remote code execution, command execution, rce, initial access, exploit via file upload|solution=Validate MIME type and extension server-side and store uploads outside webroot.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Validate MIME type and extension server-side and store uploads outside webroot.

result.name: Insecure Direct Object Reference in REST API
result.description: API endpoints expose internal object identifiers allowing cross-account data access.

nvt.name: Insecure Direct Object Reference in REST API
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:S/C:C/I:N/A:N|summary=information disclosure, sensitive data, credential, token exposure via insecure reference|solution=Enforce object-level authorization checks and mask internal identifiers in API responses.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Enforce object-level authorization checks and mask internal identifiers in API responses.

result.name: Weak JWT Signing Algorithm in Auth Token
result.description: Application accepts JWTs signed with the none algorithm enabling authentication bypass.

nvt.name: Weak JWT Signing Algorithm in Auth Token
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:C/A:N|summary=authentication bypass, bypass login, token, credential access, initial access via jwt weakness|solution=Require strong HMAC or RSA signature algorithms and reject unsigned or weakly signed tokens.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Require strong HMAC or RSA signature algorithms and reject unsigned or weakly signed tokens.

result.name: SSH Weak Key Exchange Algorithms Permitted
result.description: SSH server negotiates deprecated Diffie-Hellman groups enabling passive key recovery.

nvt.solution: Remove diffie-hellman-group1-sha1 and diffie-hellman-group14-sha1 from sshd_config.

result.name: SQL Injection in Authentication Workflow

result.name: Apache HTTP Server Path Traversal

nvt.solution: Upgrade Apache HTTP Server to a patched release and harden request normalization controls.

result.name: Privilege Escalation Through Sudo Misconfiguration
result.description: Sudo policy permits privilege escalation to root via command injection on maintenance scripts.

result.name: Authentication Bypass with Default Credentials
result.description: Administrative portal accepts default credential combinations enabling authentication bypass and initial access.

result.name: Kerberos Ticket Exposure in Logs

result.name: XML External Entity Injection in API Parser

result.name: SMB Signing Disabled on File Service
result.description: SMB signing is disabled allowing relay and man-in-the-middle credential capture.

nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:M/Au:N/C:P/I:P/A:N|summary=smb signing, credential relay, lateral movement, rpc relay potential|solution=Enable SMB signing via Group Policy on all hosts and restrict NTLM relay paths.|solution_type=VendorFix

result.name: TLS Deprecated Cipher Suites Enabled
result.description: Server advertises deprecated cipher suites enabling downgrade and weak key negotiation.

nvt.name: TLS Deprecated Cipher Suites Enabled
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:H/Au:N/C:P/I:N/A:N|summary=tls downgrade, weak cipher, information disclosure risk on encrypted transport channel|solution=Remove RC4, DES, and 3DES cipher suites and enforce TLS 1.2+ with strong cipher lists.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Remove RC4, DES, and 3DES cipher suites and enforce TLS 1.2+ with strong cipher lists.

result.name: Directory Listing Enabled on Web Root
result.description: Web server directory listing reveals internal file structure and sensitive file paths.

nvt.name: Directory Listing Enabled on Web Root

nvt.solution: Disable directory listing in web server configuration and enforce access controls.

result.name: Redis Server Unauthenticated Access

result.name: FTP Anonymous Login Enabled

result.name: SNMP Default Community String Accepted
result.description: SNMP accepts default community strings public and private exposing full MIB tree.

nvt.solution: Change SNMP community strings, migrate to SNMPv3 with auth and privacy options.

result.name: OpenSSL Heartbleed Memory Disclosure
result.description: Heartbleed allows remote read of heap memory including private keys and session credentials.

nvt.name: OpenSSL Heartbleed Memory Disclosure
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:N/A:N|summary=information disclosure, sensitive data, private key, credential, token leakage via openssl|solution=Upgrade OpenSSL to 1.0.1g or later and revoke and reissue all certificates.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Upgrade OpenSSL to 1.0.1g or later and revoke and reissue all certificates.

result.name: Unrestricted File Upload Leading to RCE
result.description: Upload endpoint accepts arbitrary file types enabling web shell upload and remote code execution.

nvt.name: Unrestricted File Upload Leading to RCE
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:C/A:C|summary=remote code execution, command execution, rce, initial access, exploit via file upload|solution=Validate MIME type and extension server-side and store uploads outside webroot.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Validate MIME type and extension server-side and store uploads outside webroot.

result.name: Insecure Direct Object Reference in REST API
result.description: API endpoints expose internal object identifiers allowing cross-account data access.

nvt.name: Insecure Direct Object Reference in REST API
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:S/C:C/I:N/A:N|summary=information disclosure, sensitive data, credential, token exposure via insecure reference|solution=Enforce object-level authorization checks and mask internal identifiers in API responses.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Enforce object-level authorization checks and mask internal identifiers in API responses.

result.name: Weak JWT Signing Algorithm in Auth Token
result.description: Application accepts JWTs signed with the none algorithm enabling authentication bypass.

nvt.name: Weak JWT Signing Algorithm in Auth Token
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:C/I:C/A:N|summary=authentication bypass, bypass login, token, credential access, initial access via jwt weakness|solution=Require strong HMAC or RSA signature algorithms and reject unsigned or weakly signed tokens.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Require strong HMAC or RSA signature algorithms and reject unsigned or weakly signed tokens.

result.name: SSH Weak Key Exchange Algorithms Permitted
result.description: SSH server negotiates deprecated Diffie-Hellman groups enabling passive key recovery.

nvt.name: SSH Weak Key Exchange Algorithms Permitted

nvt.solution: Remove diffie-hellman-group1-sha1 and diffie-hellman-group14-sha1 from sshd_config.

result.name: Cross-Site Request Forgery on Admin Panel

nvt.solution: Implement synchronizer token pattern and SameSite cookie attribute on all state-changing endpoints.

result.name: Reflected XSS in Error Page Parameter

result.name: Weak JWT Signing Algorithm in Auth Token

result.name: SSH Weak Key Exchange Algorithms Permitted
